The Chicago Culture club was back from the summer break as well with Ford giving the kick off talk for the Fall,<ref>{{cite news |title=The Chicago Culture Club will ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=October 14, 1895 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167649/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805223505/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167649/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> followed soon by an announcement of a series on French art through the Fall,<ref>{{cite news |title=Early French Art |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=3 |date=October 22, 1895 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167660/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214134/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167660/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and ford gave individuals talks - a charity<ref>{{cite news |title=To Pose for Charity |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=11 |date=October 20, 1895 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167655/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304215852/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167655/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> recital,<ref>{{cite news |title=The Model Lodging-House and Workshop for Women ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=10 |date=October 28, 1895 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167668/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 6, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170806000825/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167668/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> on [[Louis David]]<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs Mary Ford will talk ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=10 |date=October 28, 1895 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2353783/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=May 5, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805230101/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2353783/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and even a bridal rehearsal,<ref>{{cite news |title=Fair days in society |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=5 |date=November 1, 1895 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167675/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 7, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190407030032/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167675/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> all before the end of October.
In November, Ford gave another talk on Wagner,<ref>{{cite news |title=In the rooms of the Woman's ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=29 |date=November 3, 1895 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167683/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 7, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190407025956/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167683/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> as well as "[[Paul Delaroche|Delarouche]] and the Vernets".<ref>{{cite news |title=The Chicago Culture Club will ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=30 |date=November 10, 1895 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167687/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184221/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167687/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A lecture a week later was presented in a home,<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. December opens with the art critic of the ''Inter Ocean'' quoting Ford analysing the difference between [[Glasgow School of Art]] practices and American and Danish-Norwegian styles of the period, following an exhibition.<ref>{{cite news |title=Echoes from the Studios |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=31 |date=December 1, 1895 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167780/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_noted_in/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=February 19, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170219085803/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167780/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_noted_in/ |url-status=live }}</ref> This was followed a week later by Ford giving a talk on "[[Jean-François Millet|Millet]] and the [[Barbizon school|Barbizon Circle]]".<ref>{{cite news |title=Monday - The Culture club spends ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=12 |date=December 8, 1895 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167797/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 6, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160306085841/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167797/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Then the judges for the Arché prize exhibition are announced with Ford among them, indeed representing the Arché club itself.<ref>{{cite news |title=Announcement is made ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=29 |date=December 22, 1895 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167802/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304082858/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2167802/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
At least by the end of the year she was living at 3747 Langley Ave.<ref>{{cite book |title=The Chicago blue book of selected names of Chicago and suburban towns |publisher=Chicago Directory Company |date=1895 |location=Chicago, IL|page=150 (Langley Avenue) |url=https://archive.org/stream/chicagobluebooko1895chic#page/150/mode/2up}}</ref>

1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168087/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184301/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168087/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> In a few days another new topic of ceramics in art was presented.<ref>* {{cite news |title=The Chicago Ceramic Association will ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=3 |date=March 19, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2358865/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805220156/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2358865/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> At the Chicago Culture Club reception a couple days later she gave two talks.<ref>{{cite news |title=The Chicago Culture club will ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=13 |date=March 21, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168102/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805230109/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168102/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> That was followed by a talk on "The New Woman" a week later.<ref>{{cite news |title=Massachusetts society's election |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=3 |date=March 26, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168114/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805230152/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168114/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
In April, Ford again traveled to Sterling, Illinois.<ref>{{cite news |title=Field and Riley - Mrs. Ford's lecture about two great men |newspaper=Sterling Standard |location=Sterling, IL |page=4 |date=April 2, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168125/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184302/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168125/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> She then pressed on to [[Bloomington, Illinois]],<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Ford's lectures |newspaper=Bloomington Sunday Leader |location=Bloomington, IL |page=4 |date=April 12, 1896 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/illinois/bloomington/bloomington-sunday-leader/1896/04-12/page-4 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304060056/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/illinois/bloomington/bloomington-sunday-leader/1896/04-12/page-4 |url-status=live }}</ref> and returned to the Chicago area for a talk in [[Oak Park, Illinois]],<ref>{{cite news |title=Austin; The last ladies informal reception ... |newspaper=Oak Park Reporter |location=Oak Park, IL |page=5 |date=April 17, 1896 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/illinois/oak-park/oak-park-reporter/1896/04-17/page-5 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304055905/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/illinois/oak-park/oak-park-reporter/1896/04-17/page-5 |url-status=live }}</ref> and [[Evanston, Illinois]].<ref>{{cite news |title=Next Thursday evening ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=3 |date=April 21, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168441/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805223446/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168441/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Then there seems to be a break to mid-May before assisting with a benefit exhibition.<ref>{{cite news |title=Ellsworth collection in view - Exhibition of art for the benefit of vacation schools |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=May 17, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168457/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_assisted/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184255/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168457/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_assisted/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
{{Location map+|United States|width=300|float=right|caption=Early travels of Mary Hanford Ford in 1896|places= {{Location map~|United States|label=[[Bloomington, Illinois|Bloomington]]|position=bottom|lat=40.0201736|long=-88.041400}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[Oak Park, Illinois|Oak Park]]|position=top|lat=41.03542 |long=-87.03333}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[Lincoln, Nebraska|Lincoln]]|position=left|lat=40.03377 |long=-96.02834}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[Fort Wayne, Indiana|Fort Wayne]]|position=right|lat=41.00335 |long=-85.0058}} }}
That summer, Ford took part in a [[Chautauqua]], another venue previously untapped, and rather farther afield, out of [[Lincoln, Nebraska]].<ref>* {{cite news |title=Herpolsheimer & Co |newspaper=The Courier |location=Lincoln, Nebraska |page=1 |date=June 27, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168469/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_noted_in/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805181520/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168469/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_noted_in/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=Chicago Woman's Club |newspaper=The Nebraska State Journal |location=Lincoln, NE |page=8 |date=June 3, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/12874206/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talks_at/ |access-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805183238/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/12874206/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talks_at/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title =W. C. T. U. Day at Grete |newspaper =The Nebraska State Journal |location =Lincoln, NE |page =3 |date =July 11, 1896 |url =https://www.newspapers.com/clip/12874232/later_bahai_mrs_mary_hanford_ford/ |access-date =August 5, 2017 |archive-date =August 5, 2017 |archive-url =https://web.archive.org/web/20170805183139/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/12874232/later_bahai_mrs_mary_hanford_ford/ |url-status =live }} * {{cite news |title =Assembly notes |newspaper =The Nebraska State Journal |location =Lincoln, NE |page =3 |date =July 13, 1896 |url =https://www.newspapers.com/clip/12874240/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talk/ |access-date =August 5, 2017 |archive-date =August 5, 2017 |archive-url =https://web.archive.org/web/20170805183102/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/12874240/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talk/ |url-status =live }}</ref> About a month later she gave a talk on culinary choices for the heat of the summer in Chicago,<ref>{{cite news |title=Talk on food and character - Mrs Mary H. Ford tells how and what to eat this weather |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=August 10, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168497/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805182220/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168497/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and then a talk at a recital.<ref>{{cite news |title=Drawing in the schools - The Exhibit at the Art Institute will remain till Oct 3 |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=September 10, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168508/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805183514/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168508/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Then she assists with an exhibition from artists in the public school system.<ref>* {{cite news |title=Art exhibit of the public schools |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=21 |date=September 13, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168524/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_article/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304193558/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168524/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_article/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=Praise art work of pupils - addresses on school drawings made at Art Institute |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=September 27, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168601/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805183518/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168524/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_article/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
Following the breakup scandal in Kansas City and moving to Chicago several years before her husband filed for divorce claiming alienation of affection in September.<ref>{{cite news |title=Are sorry they married - Smith M Ford and others ask the Circuit Court for divorces |newspaper=Kansas City Journal |location=Kansas City, Missouri |page=1 |date=September 19, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168547/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_sued_for/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184253/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168547/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_sued_for/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Initially there was no comment of any kind - Ford was lined up for the Arché's Salon to happen in October.<ref>{{cite news |title=The Arche Club's annual ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=31 |date=September 27, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168594/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184205/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168594/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> However, in early October Ford appears in Kansas City - giving a talk on "Russia" (with front page coverage)<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. H. Ford will lecture on "Russia ..." |newspaper=Kansas City Journal |location=Kansas City, Missouri |page=1 |date=October 2, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168605/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184227/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168605/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and someone wrote a letter to the editor proclaiming her success in Chicago.<ref>{{cite news |author=Emma Playter Seabury |title=A Kansas City woman in art |newspaper=Kansas City Journal |location=Kansas City, Missouri |page=1 |date=October 11, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168707/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 7, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190407025944/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168707/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Days later she presents "[[Ibsen]] the Mystic's, [[Brand (play)|Brand]], and [[Peer Gynt]]".<ref>{{cite news |title=Chicago Culture Club - holds an interesting session at its rooms |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=12 |date=October 13, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168714/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406213956/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168714/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A week later she was speaking about "Italian Masters" a few states over in [[Fort Wayne, Indiana]].<ref>{{cite news |title=The Society of Art was favored ...|newspaper=Fort Wayne Sentinel |location=Fort Wayne, Indiana |page=4 |date=October 26, 1896 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/fort-wayne/fort-wayne-sentinel/1896/10-26/page-4 |access-date=April 18, 2015}}</ref> Then two talks were announced in Chicago - the first on [[Turgenev]] and the second on [[Liszt]].<ref>{{cite news |title=The members of the Arché club ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=3 |date=November 17, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2358902/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=May 5, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805231828/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2358902/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and then a week later another on American art.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs Mary H. Ford will lecture ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=November 29, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168724/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184211/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168724/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Then she spoke on [[Oliver Wendell Holmes Sr.|Oliver Wendell Holmes]] for the Tuesday Club,<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs Mary Ford delivered her ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=3 |date=December 2, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2358928/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talks/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168730/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 January.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford will ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=December 27, 1896 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168743/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184213/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168743/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
==Wider travels, book series and Spiritualist topics==
=== 1897 – ''Message of the Mystics'' ===
Ford introduced the topic of [[vegetarianism]],<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford will speak ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=January 3, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168752/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184230/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168752/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and then in a couple days on an English novelist.<ref>*{{cite news |title=A most enjoyable program me ... (continues) |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=26 |date=January 3, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168769/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304074448/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168769/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=(continued) |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=26 |date=January 3, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168775/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184213/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168769/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A lecture was announced for April in Sterling, Illinois.<ref>{{cite news |title=April 1. Mrs. Mary H. Ford's lecture ... |newspaper=Sterling Standard |location=Sterling, IL |page=14 |date=January 7, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168781/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184205/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168781/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A week later she was talking on "American Religious Painters".<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford will lecture ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=26 |date=January 17, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168787/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184256/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168787/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
During this year, Ford published her three books, ''The Holy Grail: The Silent Teacher'', ''Goethe's Faust: Its Ethical Symbolism'' and ''Balzac's Seraphita: The Mystery of Sex'', a series known as ''Message of the Mystics''.<ref>* {{cite book |author=Mary Hanford Finney Ford |title=The Holy Grail: The Silent Teacher |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=T5UCAAAAYAAJ |year=1897 |publisher=A.B. Stockham & Company |series=Message of the Mystics}} * {{cite book |author=Mary Hanford Finney Ford |title=Goethe' Faust: Its Ethical Symbolism |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=pb9BAAAAYAAJ |year=1897 |publisher=Alice B. Stockham & Company |series=Message of the Mystics}} * {{cite book |author=Mary Hanford Ford |title=Balzac's Seraphita: The Mystery of Sex |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=b6QRGQAACAAJ |year=1897 |publisher=A. B. Stockham & Company |series=Message of the Mystics}}</ref> In ''The Holy Grail: The Silent Teacher'' Ford shared her theory that medieval romantic texts use [[Kabbalistic]] numerology to convey hidden [[esoteric]] messages.<ref>{{cite book |author=John Barry Marino |title=The Grail Legend in Modern Literature |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Bpvg6LuXCycC&pg=PA122 |year=2004 |publisher=DS Brewer |isbn=978-1-84384-022-0 |page=122}}</ref> She delivered a series of six lectures, based on the books, titled ''The Universal Ministry'' with the aim of "...pointing out the unanimity with which the great poets and teachers of the world have preached the same ethical and spiritual truth." The last lecture in this series was on [[Spiritualism (movement)|Spiritualist]], [[Elizabeth Stuart Phelps]].<ref>{{cite news |title=lectures by Mrs. Ford - a series of six talks announced on "The Universal Ministry" |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=January 20, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168792/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805231830/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168792/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
Still in January, she gave a talk for the Independent Penwomen's Club,<ref>{{cite news |title=The Independent Penwomen's Club will meet ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=4 |date=January 23, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168797/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184238/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168797/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> as well as at a private home.<ref>{{cite news |title=Dr. Alice B. Stockham ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=5 |date=January 23, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168802/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184358/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168802/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A week later she gave a talk for the Arché club.<ref>{{cite news |title=The Arché club will hold ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=3 |date=January 28, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168817/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805235155/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2168817/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> In February she was scheduled for a short series of talks in [[Goshen, Indiana]].<ref>* {{cite news |title=The Beacon Lights have engaged ... |newspaper=Goshen Daily News |location=Goshen, IN |page=4 |date=February 1, 1897 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/goshen/goshen-daily-news/1897/02-01/page-4 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 have engaged ... |newspaper=Goshen Daily News |location=Goshen, IN |page=4 |date=February 2, 1897 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/goshen/goshen-daily-news/1897/02-02/page-4 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304070512/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/goshen/goshen-daily-news/1897/02-02/page-4 |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=The Beacon Lights have engaged ... |newspaper=Goshen Daily News |location=Goshen, IN |page=4 |date=February 3, 1897 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/goshen/goshen-daily-news/1897/02-03/page-4 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304065030/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/goshen/goshen-daily-news/1897/02-03/page-4 |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=The Beacon Lights The divorce was granted, noting she didn't even appear in court.<ref>{{cite news |title=Smith Moses Ford Divorced - separated from his wife on the grounds of abandonment |newspaper=Kansas City Journal |location=Kansas City, MO |page=1 |date=April 22, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169043/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_divorced/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 7, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190407030034/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169043/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_divorced/ |url-status=live }}</ref> She returned anyway in another month - a quiet month considering her usual pattern - announcing a series and a summer appearance,<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford, who will be ... |newspaper=Kansas City Journal |location=Kansas City, MO |page=1 |date=June 3, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169112/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184211/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169112/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Still she squeezed in individual talks in June,<ref>{{cite news |title=At the last regular meeting ... |newspaper=The Leavenworth Times |location=Leavenworth, KS |page=3 |date=June 4, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169118/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 7, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190407030009/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169118/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> including a benefit,<ref>* {{cite news |title=The Chautauqua Association is sparing ... |newspaper=Cedar Falls Semi Weekly Cedar Falls Gazette |location=Cedar Falls, IA |page=8 |date=June 8, 1897 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/iowa/cedar-falls/cedar-falls-semi-weekly-cedar-falls-gazette/1897/06-08/page-8 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304061616/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/iowa/cedar-falls/cedar-falls-semi-weekly-cedar-falls-gazette/1897/06-08/page-8 |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=After the closing lecture ... |newspaper=The Leavenworth Times |location=Leavenworth, KS |page=5 |date=June 9, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169128/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304061616/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/iowa/cedar-falls/cedar-falls-semi-weekly-cedar-falls-gazette/1897/06-08/page-8 |url-status=live }}</ref> before heading back to Chicago. However, after a month plus she appears giving talks in [[Ludington, Michigan]] on the social mission of Christianity,<ref>{{cite book |title=North-western Christian Advocate |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=TIYxAQAAMAAJ&pg=RA16-PA30 |year=1897 |publisher=Swormstedt & Poe |page=16}}</ref> and then in [[Waterloo, Iowa]] initiating a series of talks.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Eliza Tirrell, of Manchester, reads a paper ... |newspaper=Waterloo Daily Courier |location=Waterloo, IA |page=5 |date=July 8, 1897 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/iowa/waterloo/waterloo-daily-courier/1897/07-08/page-5 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304084318/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/iowa/waterloo/waterloo-daily-courier/1897/07-08/page-5 |url-status=live }}</ref> The next day still in Waterloo she gave two talks.<ref>{{cite news |title=Women's council and round table. |newspaper=Waterloo Daily Courier |location=Waterloo, IA |page=5 |date=July 9, 1897 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/iowa/waterloo/waterloo-daily-courier/1897/07-09/page-5 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 6, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160806152525/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/iowa/waterloo/waterloo-daily-courier/1897/07-09/page-5 |url-status=live }}</ref> Later in August she returned to the Chicago area.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford of Chicago ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=13 |date=August 22, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169140/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_is_guest/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214052/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169140/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_is_guest/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
The Arché club had Ford as the "club lecturer" for the season and noted two talks specifically in October,<ref>{{cite news |title=The Arche club has an ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=October 2, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169145/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184307/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169145/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and then a talk at the Menoken Club.<ref>{{cite news|title=The Future|quote=The next ladies' afternoon of the Menoken Club ...|newspaper=The Inter Ocean|location=Chicago, IL|page=38|date=October 17, 1897|url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169153/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/|access-date=April 18, 2015|archive-date=April 6, 2019|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406213948/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169153/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/|url-status=live}}</ref> Later in October at a conference of women's clubs Ford spoke of promoting arts with the group letting her talk twice the allotted time.<ref>{{cite news |title=In the cause of art |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=2 |date=October 26, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169160/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184239/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169160/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
November began with a talk at the Arché club,<ref>{{cite news |title=The Arche club held its regular ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=38 |date=November 7, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169185/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184223/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169185/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> with another in a couple weeks.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mary H. Ford delivered a lecture ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=November 20, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169187/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214102/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169187/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Her book series ''Message of the Mystics'' was noted for sale in Kansas City.<ref>{{cite news |title=Message of the Mystics |newspaper=Kansas City Journal |location=Kansas City, MO |page=1 |date=November 22, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163475/later_bahai_mary_hanford_fords_book/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184227/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163475/later_bahai_mary_hanford_fords_book/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A series of conferences on social development were announced by the Forward Movement and Ford was among the speakers.<ref>{{cite news |title=A series of social conferences ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=November 25, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169198/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184207/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169198/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> She closes out November with a talk for the Arché club.<ref>{{cite news |title=Arché club - Lecture on ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=5 |date=November 29, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169204/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805222706/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169204/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
Ford starts another series of talks in December featured in a home.<ref>* {{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford spoke ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=39 |date=December 5, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169234/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805223438/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169234/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title="Don Quixote and the Spanish Ideal"... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=10 |date=December 16, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169250/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304203633/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169250/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title="Don Quixote and the Spanish ideal"... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=43 |date=December 19, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169271/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214002/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169234/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> The Forward Movemnent's speakers for the conferences in the second week of December were announced including [[Clarence Darrow]] and Ford (on "The Artist's Aristocracy").<ref>{{cite news |title=Four sessions to be held in Kenwood beginning Wednesday |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=December 13, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169241/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184209/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169241/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Her talk focused on [[John Ruskin]] (also a Spiritualist), and [[William Morris]].<ref>{{cite news |title=Influence of modern art - Mrs. Mary H. Ford delivers an address in Ryder Chapel |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=17 |date=December 5, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169224/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214112/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169224/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> She returned to the subject of Ruskin two weeks later.<ref>{{cite news |title=The Arche club - is addressed by Mrs. Mary H. Ford on Ruskin |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=December 18, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169256/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214046/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169256/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Meanwhile, her books continued to be noticed,<ref>{{cite news |title=Under the general title of "Message of the Mystics"... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=10 |date=December 18, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163593/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_books/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805223248/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163593/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_books/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and received some summary in the publication of it as the year closes.<ref>* {{cite news |title="The Message of the Mystics" (continues) |newspaper=The Kinsley Graphic |location=Kinsley, KA |page=5 |date=December 24, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163599/later_bahai_mary_hanford_fords_books/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805220601/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163599/later_bahai_mary_hanford_fords_books/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=(continued) |newspaper=The Kinsley Graphic |location=Kinsley, KA |page=5 |date=December 24, 1897 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163601/later_bahai_mary_hanford_fords_books/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805220601/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163599/later_bahai_mary_hanford_fords_books/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
=== 1898 – More personal coverage === The new year began the same "Holy Grail" talk from her books, first before the "Noonday Rest" Club - reportedly with some 300 present - and broaching a [[Parcifal]] angle that would later be a book.<ref>{{cite news |title=Theme is "The Holy Grail" - Mrs Mary H. Ford addresses the Noonday Rest Club |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=12 |date=January 6, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169281/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214051/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169281/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Just a few days later she gave the same named talk to clubs in [[Sedalia, Missouri]].<ref>{{cite news |title=Literary Clubs - Third annual meeting of the Missouri Federation |newspaper=The Sedalia Democrat |location=Sedalia, MO |page=5 |date=January 9, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163606/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184229/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163606/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A week later she was back in Chicago, this time speaking on [[Tolstoi]],<ref>{{cite news |title=Tuesday Morning club ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=January 17, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169286/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805224407/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169286/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and the ongoing series in a home continued into February.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford gave her seventh ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=9 |date=January 27, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169335/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805220650/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169335/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford gave her seventh ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=35 |date=January 30, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171735/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 5, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160305014708/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171735/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford gave ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=5 |date=February 3, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171738/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805222642/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171738/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford gave her seventh art ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=35 |date=February 6, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169354/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805220650/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169335/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Among these she also attended a regional conference of women clubs in Missouri.<ref>{{cite news |title=Take up NY |newspaper=Kansas City Journal |location=Kansas City, MO |page=1 |date=January 21, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169324/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_at/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184224/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169324/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_at/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Still in February she gave a talk to the [[Hull House]] women about a trip of hers to Spain,<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford addressed ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=February 10, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169366/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184130/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169366/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and then addressed the [[The Nineteenth Century Club|Nineteenth Century Club]] in [[Benton Harbor, Michigan]] before mid-February.<ref>* {{cite news |title=Michael Angelo - Twin city literary clubs hear of the artist |newspaper=Benton Harbor Evening News |location=Benton Harbor, MI |page=5 |date=February 11, 1898 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/michigan/benton-harbor/benton-harbor-evening-news/1898/02-11/page-5 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304070552/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/michigan/benton-harbor/benton-harbor-evening-news/1898/02-11/page-5 |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=Michael Angelo |newspaper=The News-Palladium |location=Benton Harbor, MI |page=5 |date=February 11, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2169379/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304070552/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/michigan/benton-harbor/benton-harbor-evening-news/1898/02-11/page-5 |url-status=live }}</ref> The next talk was for the Englewood Woman's club and was on [[Ivan Turgenev]],<ref>{{cite news |title=The Englewood Woman's club ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=34 |date=February 20, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171741/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805230023/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171741/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and then [[Rembrandt]] over in Fort Wayne, Indiana (that makes three states in one month she gave talks),<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford, of Chicago ... |newspaper=Fort Wayne Sentinel |location=Fort Wayne, IN |page=3 |date=February 24, 1898 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/fort-wayne/fort-wayne-sentinel/1898/02-24/page-3 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304053413/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/fort-wayne/fort-wayne-sentinel/1898/02-24/page-3 |url-status=live }}</ref> and scheduled for a talk in Sterling, Illinois, next month,<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford ... |newspaper=Sterling Standard |location=Sterling, IL |page=9 |date=February 24, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171742/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_leaves/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184128/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171742/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_leaves/ |url-status=live }}</ref> though she finishes out February back in Chicago.<ref>*{{cite news |title=Yesterday afternoon was social ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=5 |date=February 24, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2359027/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304114106/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2359027/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=Ryder Memorial ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=20 |date=February 27, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171747/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184235/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2359027/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
March began with a talk before the Arché club on [[Robert Louis Stevenson]],<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford lectured ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=5 |date=March 5, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171750/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214032/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171750/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> followed by a talk in a home on [[Quo vadis]] (possibly on the [[Quo Vadis (novel)|novel]]).<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford will lecture ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=March 12, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171803/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184334/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171803/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A day later she returned to her subject "The Holy Grail".<ref>{{cite news |title=Seventy-five guests ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=37 |date=March 13, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171807/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184309/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171807/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A week later she was indeed in Fort Wayne.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford will give a talk on ANimal and Landscape Painters |newspaper=Fort Wayne Journal |location=Fort Wayne, IN |page=7 |date=March 20, 1898 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/fort-wayne/fort-wayne-journal/1898/03-20/page-7 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304001754/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/fort-wayne/fort-wayne-journal/1898/03-20/page-7 |url-status=live }}</ref>
{{Location map+|United States|width=400|float=right|caption=Early travels of Mary Hanford Ford in 1898|places= {{Location map~|United States|label=[[Sedalia, Missouri|Sedalia]]|position=bottom|lat=38.0293 |long=-93.0096}} {{Location map~|United States|label=[[Kansas City, Missouri|Kansas City]]|position=right|lat=39.0042|long=-94.0241}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[Benton Harbor, Michigan|Benton Harbor]]|position=top|lat=42.0046|long=-86.01868}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[Fort Wayne, Indiana|Fort Wayne]]|position=right|lat=41.0034 |long=-85.0058}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[Sterling, Illinois|Sterling]]|position=bottom|lat=41.0332 |long=-89.0289}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[Marshall, Michigan|Marshall]]|position=right|lat=42.0114|long=-84.0401}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[Topeka, Kansas|Topeka]]|position=left|lat=39.0023 |long=-95.0287}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[Waterloo, Iowa|Waterloo]]|position=left|lat=42.4924 |long=-92.3462}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[New York, New York|New York City]]|position=right|lat=40.0297 |long=-74.0002}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[Dixon, Illinois|Dixon]]|position=left|lat=41.0353 |long=-89.0202}} {{location map~|United States|label=[[Denver, Colorado|Denver]]|position=left|lat=39.7619 |long=-104.8811}} }}
In April she was visible giving a talk before the "Twentieth Century Sanitary Home and Bulsson Institute" in Chicago,<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford will deliver ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=April 10, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171804/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184234/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171804/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and then the Æolus club.<ref>{{cite news |title=Wicker Park Culture club ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=39 |date=April 10, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171808/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805223551/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171808/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Just a couple days later she spoke before the Society of Art on "Israel and His Followers".<ref>{{cite news |title=The Society of Art will meet ... |newspaper=The Fort Wayne Sentinel |location=Fort Wayne, IN |page=4 |date=April 12, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171812/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184226/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171812/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A week later she was in [[Marshall, Michigan]] giving a talk.<ref>{{cite news |title=The lecture, to be given by Mrs. Mary Hanford Ford ... |newspaper=Marshall Daily Chronicle |location=Marshall, IN |page=2 |date=April 25, 1898 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/michigan/marshall/marshall-daily-chronicle/1898/04-25/page-2 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304060217/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/michigan/marshall/marshall-daily-chronicle/1898/04-25/page-2 |url-status=live }}</ref> She gave a series of talks in [[Topeka, Kansas]] before mid-May, the first program of the federated clubs,<ref>{{cite news |title=The federation of clubs of Topeka Kas. ... |newspaper=The Courier |location=Lincoln, NE |page=First Edition |date=May 7, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171816/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214022/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171816/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> before returning to Chicago, just days later, speaking on [[James Whitcomb Riley]] and [[Eugene Field]].<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford will lecture ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=May 17, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171818/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214056/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171818/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A week later Ford was set to be one of the speakers before a conference of clubs across the city along with artists and instructors.<ref>{{cite news |title=The Chicago Art association ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=12 |date=May 29, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171820/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_in/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214049/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171820/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_in/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A wider regional conference was set in Denver in June and Ford went representing the Aloha club.<ref>* {{cite news |title=The Aloha sent ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=6 |date=June 20, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171821/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_is/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214058/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171821/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_is/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=Practical fancy work |newspaper=Denver Rocky Mountain News |location =Denver, Colorado |page=9 |date =June 25, 1898 }}</ref> In early July she was in the Waterloo [[Chautauqua]].<ref>{{cite news |title=Local Chronology - July 8 ... Mrs. H. Ford ... |newspaper=Waterloo Daily Reporter |location=Waterloo, IA |page=8 |date=July 8, 1898 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/iowa/waterloo/waterloo-daily-reporter/1898/07-08/page-8 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 6, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160806165349/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/iowa/waterloo/waterloo-daily-reporter/1898/07-08/page-8 |url-status=live }}</ref> Ford was recognized as a key figure in Arche club and Chicago Culture Club history.<ref>{{cite book |author=Jane Cunningham Croly |title=The History of the Woman's Club Movement in America |url=https://archive.org/details/historywomanscl01clubgoog |year=1898 |publisher=H. G. Allen & Company |pages=[https://archive.org/details/historywomanscl01clubgoog/page/n398 376]–378, 381–383}}</ref>
In August, the Ford family made the news with their picnics on the beach of Lake Michigan. Mary, her children and a few other families, with their several youths, are noted as attending.<ref>* {{cite news |title=They Bathe on the beach |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=3 |date=August 31, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171828/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_among/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304142053/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171828/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_among/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=Kenwood's younger set gave a corn roast ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=September 2, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171843/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_at_beach/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805222645/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171828/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_among/ |url-status=live }}</ref> The family's home also made the news with Ford talking about a ghost in her home (housekeeper, children, and herself speaking of it).<ref>{{cite news |title=Ghost of John Lane |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=25 |date=September 4, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171905/later_bahai_mary_hanford_fords/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214051/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171905/later_bahai_mary_hanford_fords/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Another ghost reference briefly referred back to this coverage later in September.<ref>{{cite news |title=Spook's odd antics |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=35 |date=September 25, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172076/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214033/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172076/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
In September, Hull House announced a series through the Fall, Winter and into the Spring, with Ford giving a talk once a month from October to March.<ref>{{cite news |title=The programme of the Hull House Woman's club ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=6 |date=September 2, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171839/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }} * {{cite news |title=The Hull House Woman's club ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=September 29, 1898 series of talks including Ford every other week into about January.<ref>* {{cite news |title=For the season of 1898–99 the Arche club... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=6 news |title=Mrs. L. E. Burr of No. 4017 ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=15 |date=October 9, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172142/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talks/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184142/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171934/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_series/ |url-status=live }}</ref> The Arché coverage was noted in Nebraska.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford will give ... |newspaper=The Courier |location=Lincoln, NE |page=First Edition |date=October 1, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172140/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talks/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 7, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190407030036/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172140/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talks/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
The ''Chicago Times-Herald'' did a profile of Ford in November and it was echoed widely through December.<ref name=CTHProfile/> Calling her "a woman of wide intellectuality" there is no mention of her husband's publicity or divorce. It simply refers to "unexpected circumstance which suddenly necessitate the caring for and education of her children ... dropping of the financial burden upon her slender shoulders".<ref name=CTHProfile/> It credits her with over 800 talks and across many major cities(though not a detailed accounting) and having given lectures in German and French in addition to English.<ref name=CTHProfile/> Another article, and her talk before the Hull House, noted she "... for three consecutive years has come before the club, each time with something new in itself, or, if old, made new by the happy, infectious personality of the speaker. ... "<ref>{{cite news |title=Hull House Woman's club ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=November 3, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172145/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talks_on/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184315/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172145/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talks_on/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Now in November, talks continued with Ford among a free series.<ref>{{cite news |title=The free lecture course ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=4 |date=November 5, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172167/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talks_on/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184314/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172167/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talks_on/ |url-status=live }}</ref> She was profiled on her sense of being guided in some decisions like coming to Chicago.<ref>{{cite news |title=As seen in dreams |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=26 |date=November 6, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172172/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_unusual/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184207/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172172/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_unusual/ |url-status=live }}</ref> In the interview she spoke of dreaming about the "conference of the World's Unity league" at Lake Geneva with a figure that told her to go.<ref>{{cite news |title=As seen in dreams |newspaper=Altoona Tribune |location=Altoona, PA |page=2 |date=November 8, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172188/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_unusual/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 7, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190407025940/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172188/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_unusual/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Late in November she was again profiled, noting she was "abolishing all class distinction within her household"<ref name=AppleToReason>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary Hanford Ford |newspaper=Appeal to Reason |location=Girard, KA |page=2 |date=November 24, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163612/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_quoted/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214035/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163612/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_quoted/ |url-status=live }}</ref> having gone from perhaps an [[anarchist]] view to a [[libertarian socialism]] view - "At all events, I believe in sowing the good seed whenever possible. ... "<ref name=AppleToReason/> Then she spoke before the Englewood Woman's club,<ref>{{cite news |title=Mary H. Ford delivered ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=10 |date=November 8, 1898 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172303/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ NJ|page=7 |date =November 17, 1898 }}</ref> and spoke before the Arché club back in Chicago,<ref>{{cite news |title=The Arche study class ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 === 1899 – A slower pace, and reaching Boston === Ford began the year reviewing American decorative art with reproductions from the Boston Public Library.<ref>{{cite news |title=Lecture on American Art |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=2 |date=January 7, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172390/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184218/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172390/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> Next was "Russia" before the Chicago Literary Score,<ref>{{cite news |title=The Chicago Literary Score ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=28 |date=January 8, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172394/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805232040/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172394/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and then on [[Tennyson]] (even advertised in Nebraska).<ref>{{cite news |title=The subject for the literary meeting ... |newspaper=The Nebraska State Journal |location=Lincoln, NE |page=10 |date=January 15, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172397/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805231955/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172397/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
In February, after two weeks, she spoke again,<ref>{{cite news |title=Hull House Club Election |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=6 |date=February 2, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172399/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 7, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190407030038/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172399/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and then in another two weeks was in Benton Harbor, Michigan on the Holy Grail topic.<ref>{{cite news |title=Stories of Holy Grail |newspaper=Benton Harbor Weekly Palladium |location=Benton Harbor, MI |page=4 |date=February 17, 1899 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/michigan/benton-harbor/benton-harbor-weekly-palladium/1899/02-17/page-4 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304085650/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/michigan/benton-harbor/benton-harbor-weekly-palladium/1899/02-17/page-4 |url-status=live }}</ref> By late February a series was run in Dixon, Illinois, for the Phidian Art Club,<ref>{{cite news |title=The fifth lecture in the course ... |newspaper=Dixon Evening Telegraph |location=Dixon, IL |page=1 |date=February 23, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172402/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214124/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172402/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> but ended the month in Fort Wayne, Indiana, (noting in three days she did three talks in two cities).<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford, who will be heard ... |newspaper=Fort Wayne Journal |location=Fort Wayne, IN |page=4 |date=February 27, 1899 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/fort-wayne/fort-wayne-journal/1899/02-27/page-4 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304035946/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/fort-wayne/fort-wayne-journal/1899/02-27/page-4 |url-status=live }}</ref> In March she was back in Fort Wayne<ref>{{cite news |title=The members of the Society of Art enjoyed ... |newspaper=Fort Wayne Sentinel |location=Fort Wayne, IN |page=4 |date=March 3, 1899 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/fort-wayne/fort-wayne-sentinel/1899/03-03/page-4 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304040848/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/fort-wayne/fort-wayne-sentinel/1899/03-03/page-4 |url-status=live }}</ref> and right back to Chicago,<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford spoke ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=March 4, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172408/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184236/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172408/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and back still again to Fort Wayne.<ref>{{cite news |title=The members of the Society of Art ... |newspaper=Fort Wayne Sentinel |location=Fort Wayne, IN |page=2 |date=March 6, 1899 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/fort-wayne/fort-wayne-journal/1899/03-06/page-2 |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=March 4, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304023853/http://newspaperarchive.com/us/indiana/fort-wayne/fort-wayne-journal/1899/03-06/page-2 |url-status=live }}</ref> A week later she offered a talk at a benefit in Chicago for a "Charity Hospital"<ref>{{cite news |title=An evening with Mrs. Mary Hanford Ford ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=26 |date=March 12, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163626/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 Chicago Culture Club.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary Hanford Ford lectured ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=March 14, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163628/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 Independent Pen Woman's Club on her subject of "The Aristocracy of Art",<ref>{{cite news |title=Wednesday - Meeting of the United Study ... |newspaper=Chicago Daily Tribune |location=Chicago, IL |page=8 |date=March 20, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172414/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805235231/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172414/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and then she was in Dixon, Illinois talking on [[John La Farge]].<ref>{{cite news |title=The sixth and last lecture by Mrs. Mary H. Ford ... |newspaper=Dixon Evening Telegraph |location=Dixon, IL |page=8 |date=March 23, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172421/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184126/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172421/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> A week later she was talking on "Society and Fiction" at another benefit for the same "Charity Hospital",<ref>{{cite news |title=South Side society crowded Rosalie hall ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=April 4, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163633/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184259/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163633/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and before a program Ford devised for a club in [[Springfield, Missouri]].<ref>{{cite news |title=The current literature department outlined ... |newspaper=The Leader-Democrat |location=Springfield, MO |page=8 |date=April 6, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2359063/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214122/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2359063/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> After a couple weeks she gave a talk at a home on "The Present Day Value of Occultism".<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford lectured ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=7 |date=April 14, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172425/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406214100/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172425/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
In later April she was named an associate director of the Illinois Art league,<ref>{{cite news |title=Artists form trust |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=5 |date=April 25, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163644/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_on/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184138/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163644/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_on/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and closed out the month at a home based talk "The reality of psychic vision".<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford lectured ... |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=35 |date=April 30, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172494/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=April 6, 2019 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190406184250/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172494/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
After taking off near two weeks she gives a talk on [[Victor Hugo]],<ref>{{cite news |title=Announcements |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL |page=12 |date=May 14, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163647/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805223307/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163647/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |url-status=live }}</ref> and then in July in a [[Logansport, Indiana]] a [[Quip (wit)|quip]] of hers headed a suggested menu for an event.<ref>{{cite news |title=Menu for Wednesday |newspaper=Logansport Pharos-Tribune |location=Logansport, IN |page=19 |date=July 18, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172510/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_quoted/ |access-date=April 18, 2015 |archive-date=August 5, 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170805230043/https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172510/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_quoted/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
In August she goes from a talk in [[Dubuque, Iowa]],<ref>{{cite news |title=A literary afternoon |newspaper=Dubuque Daily Herald |location=Dubuque, IA|page=8 |date=August 4, 1899 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/iowa/dubuque/dubuque-daily-herald/1899/08-04/page-8 |access-date=April 18, 2015}}</ref> to a talk in the Alice Breed home in [[Lynn, Massachusetts]] where she did a series of some ten of her lecture subjects<ref>{{cite news |title=In the artistic music room ...|newspaper=Boston Herald |location =Boston, MA|page=32 |date =August 27, 1899 }}</ref> - and this noted in the Kansas City area as well.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford, of Chicago ...|newspaper=Kansas City Journal |location=Kansas City, MO|page=7 |date=August 31, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163652/later_bahais_mary_hanford_ford_and/ |access-date=April 18, 2015}}</ref> The Breed family would be one she would have many interactions with in coming years. From September to October is there a gap in coverage. She is next noted in Dubuque, Iowa in mid-October in the midst of a series of talks.<ref>{{cite news |title=Ruskin as a thinker |newspaper=Dubuque Daily Herald |location=Dubuque, IA|page=8 |date=October 10, 1899 |url=https://newspaperarchive.com/us/iowa/dubuque/dubuque-daily-herald/1899/10-10/page-8 |access-date=April 18, 2015}}</ref> She was announced in the season's talks of the Chicago Culture Club as well.<ref>{{cite news |title=The Chicago Culture club will hold ...|newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL|page=18 |date=October 15, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172680/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_to_give/ |access-date=April 18, 2015}}</ref> She presented a talk for the Arché club later in October,<ref>{{cite news |title=The Arche club ...|newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL|page=7 |date=October 21, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172686/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015}}</ref> among a larger list of speakers.<ref>{{cite news |title=Art Congress opens today |newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL|page=12 |date=October 24, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163687/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015}}</ref> A month later she spoke on [[Harriet Beecher Stowe]] for the Arché Club.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Mary H. Ford spoke ...|newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL|page=18 |date=November 19, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172696/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015}}</ref> In a few days she gave a talk in Kansas City,<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Ford's Lecture |newspaper=Kansas City Journal |location=Kansas City, MO|page=10 |date=November 22, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2171532/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_gives/ |access-date=April 18, 2015}}</ref> and was scheduled for a series in Dixon, Illinois in late November.<ref>{{cite news |title=Phidian at Club |newspaper=Dixon Evening Telegraph |location=Dixon, IL|page=5 |date=September 30, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2172616/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_talk/ |access-date=April 18, 2015}}</ref> Two weeks later in near mid-December she was listed as a guest at a breakfast while another presents a talk for the meeting.<ref>{{cite news |title=Mrs. Laura Dainty Pelham No. 425 ...|newspaper=The Inter Ocean |location=Chicago, IL|page=7 |date=December 12, 1899 |url=https://www.newspapers.com/clip/2163720/later_bahai_mary_hanford_ford_guest/ |access-date=April 18, 2015}}</ref>
